meaning: to play fast and loose with the law; to game the system; (leisure) rul
sentence: 这款游戏玩法很新颖，我很喜欢。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yóu xì wán fǎ hěn xīn yǐng, wǒ hěn xǐ huān.
english: This game has very innovative gameplay; I really like it.

sentence: 古代读书人通过科举进入仕途。
pinyin: Gǔ dài dú shū rén tōng guò kē jǔ jìn rù shì tú.
english: In ancient times, scholars entered officialdom through the imperial examination.

meaning: evolution of sth over time; course of development; history
sentence: 这本书介绍了这座城市的历史沿革。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū jiè shào le zhè zuò chéng shì de lì shǐ yán gé.
english: This book traces the historical evolution of this city.

sentence: 医生建议他去检查一下精液质量。
pinyin: Yī shēng jiàn yì tā qù jiǎn chá yī xià jīng yè zhì liàng.
english: The doctor suggested he get his semen quality checked.

meaning: year after year; on an annual basis
sentence: 公司的销售额逐年增加。
pinyin: Gōng sī de xiāo shòu é zhú nián zēng jiā.
english: The company's sales revenue has grown year after year.
